result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Amazon search results page with filters applied; a sponsored Rythflo neckband Bluetooth headphones result is visible on the right.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Rythflo Neckband Bluetooth Headphones, ENC IPX7 Sweatproof Sport Earbuds…”
“4.6”
“200+ bought in past month”
“$19.99”
“Long Battery Life”
“Vibration Call Alert”
“AI-enhanced voice clarity”
“Bluetooth”
selected_candidate:
Rythflo Neckband Bluetooth Headphones, ENC IPX7 Sweatproof Sport Earbuds with AI-Enhanced Mic Vibration Call Alert, 50H Playtime...
constraint_evidence:
- Bluetooth neckband earphones: supported (title says “Neckband Bluetooth Headphones”).
- At least 12 hours playback time: supported (visible “50H Playtime” in action label/title context; also “Long Battery Life” visible).
- Sweat-proof: supported (title includes “Sweatproof” and “IPX7”).
- Priced under $50: supported ($19.99 visible).
- At least 4-star rating: supported (4.6 stars visible).
- Amazon product/result page: supported.
action_target:
Click the Rythflo sponsored result title/span.
success_signals:
Product detail page opens for Rythflo; URL/title changes to the product page; item details confirm the same candidate.
failure_signals:
Click misses the result; page scrolls or no navigation occurs; another product opens; selected item does not match constraints.
uncertainty:
The screenshot does not explicitly show the full “50H Playtime” text in the result card, but it is directly supported by the action label/title context.
